completion_promises.criterion_text: A second run over an unchanged corpus creates or modifies no stored record
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_second_run_is_noop that runs reindex_corpus twice on the same corpus and verifies that the version number does not increment, proving the second run is a no-op at the database level

completion_promises.criterion_text: Re-indexing after editing a source document updates its record to the new content with no duplicate record
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_edit_updates_not_duplicates that modifies a document (changing module_path field), re-runs reindex_corpus, and verifies the version increments while only one record exists (no duplicate)

completion_promises.criterion_text: Two re-index runs started at the same time converge to exactly one record per natural key (no duplicate from the overlapping runs)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_concurrent_runs_converge that runs two reindex_corpus calls concurrently using asyncio.gather and verifies exactly one record exists for the natural key after both complete

completion_promises.criterion_text: Publishing the same parsed document twice yields exactly one record for its natural key
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_double_publish_single_record that calls DeterministicWriter.write twice with the same ADRPayload and verifies only one record exists with version=1 (no version increment from duplicate write)

completion_promises.criterion_text: A document whose body contains injection-shaped text is stored byte-for-byte and no command executes during ingest
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_injection_body_stored_verbatim that creates a document with SQL injection, XSS, shell commands, template injection, and Java injection patterns, publishes it through reindex_corpus, and verifies the injection text is stored verbatim in the content field with no execution

completion_promises.criterion_text: A reviewed backfill payload is stored as a typed record like a deterministically parsed payload
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_reviewed_backfill_stored_as_typed_record that creates a manually-crafted ADRPayload (simulating backfill), writes it via DeterministicWriter, and compares its stored structure to a parsed ADRPayload to verify both have identical metadata field sets

completion_promises.criterion_text: All tests are @pytest.mark.integration gated and run against an ephemeral pgvector instance (excluded from the default hermetic unit run)
completion_promises.evidence: All 6 tests are marked with @pytest.mark.integration and use the ephemeral_pg and test_settings fixtures. Tests are excluded from default pytest run via pyproject.toml addopts and must be run with pytest -m integration
